error_bot_token: You need to configure the bot token with the TELEGRAM_TOKEN variable
error_bot_token_invalid: The TELEGRAM_TOKEN does not have a valid format. It must contain a colon ':' (example: 123456789:ABCdef...). Get it from @BotFather.
error_bot_telegram_admin: You need to configure the chatId of the user who will interact with the bot with the TELEGRAM_ADMIN variable
error_bot_telegram_admin_anonymous: You cannot be anonymous to control the bot. In the variable TELEGRAM_ADMIN you have to put your user id.
error_bot_telegram_thread: The variable TELEGRAM_THREAD is the thread within a supergroup, it is a numeric value. It has been set to $1.
error_multiple_admin_only_with_group: Multiple administrators can only be specified if used in a group (using the TELEGRAM_GROUP variable)
error_sending_message: Could not send message to $1: $2. Error: [$3]
error_reading_devices_file: An error occurred while processing the devices file. Error: [$1]
warning_not_admin: User $1 (@$2) is not an administrator and has tried to use the bot.
user_not_admin:
❌ This bot does not belong to you.

If you want to wake up your devices via telegram deploy me on your server.

Take a look at [DockerHub](https://hub.docker.com/r/dgongut/wakebot) where you will find a docker-compose. 

Are you curious? The code is published on [GitHub](https://github.com/dgongut/wakebot).

If you have questions, ask me, I'm @dgongut
menu:
*⚡️ WakeBot at your service*

Available commands:

 · /wake Complete list of devices.
 · /list Detailed list (IP and MAC).
 · /add Add a new device.
 · /remove Remove a device.
 · /rename Rename a device.
 · /version Displays the current version.
 · /donate Donate to the developer.
empty_file:
🙁 There are no devices in memory.
Use the /add command to add your first device. Have its IP address and MAC address ready.
wake_message: ⚡️ Click on a device to send it the _wake on lan_ signal
remove_message: 🗑️ Click on a device to remove it from the memory
rename_message: ✏️ Click on a device to rename it
list_duplicate_note: ⚠️ _There are devices sharing the same MAC (marked with ⚠️)_
cancel_input: The previous input data have been deleted
input_name_invalid: ❌ The name may not contain more than 46 characters, the pipe | or backtick symbols, and may not already be in use.
input_mac:
⚙️ Please enter the MAC address of the device. You can use `:`, `-` or `.` as separator.

Example:

`AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF`
input_mac_invalid:
❌ The MAC address does not follow the valid format.

Use 6 hexadecimal pairs separated by `:`, `-` or `.`, like the example:

`AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF`
input_mac_duplicated: ❌ A device with that MAC address already exists.
device_not_found: ⚠️ That device no longer exists. It may have been removed.
error_sending_wol: Could not send Wake on LAN to $1. Error: [$2]
input_ip:
🖥️ Please enter the local ip address of the device using dots as separator.

Example:

`192.168.1.32`
input_ip_invalid:
❌ The IP address does not follow the valid format.

Please use dots as separator like the example:

`192.168.1.32`
device_added:
✅ Device *added* successfully:

 · *Name*: `$1`
 · *MAC*: `$2`
 · *IP*: `$3`

To wake up, use /wake command
input_new_name: ✏️ Please enter the new name for the device `$1`
version:
⚙️ _Version: $1_
Developed with ❤️ by @dgongut

If you find any bugs or suggestions, contact me.

You can find everything related to this bot at [DockerHub](https://hub.docker.com/r/dgongut/wakebot) or on [GitHub](https://github.com/dgongut/wakebot).
donate: This project is open source and I do it in my spare time. Donating will not enable any extra features. It is simply an ideal way to say thank you for the work behind a project like this. If you wish to do so, [click here](https://donate.dgongut.com). Thank you very much ❤️
